parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'email_notifications_enabled';

SELECT e.id AS email_id, e.subject, e.from_email, e.from_name, e.date,
       e.gmail_message_id,
       ec.classification, ec.sub_category, ec.is_urgent,
       eed.company_name, eed.role_title, eed.contact_person, eed.contact_email,
       eed.interview_date, eed.interview_time, eed.interview_format,
       eed.interview_platform, eed.interview_location, eed.interview_link,
       eed.interviewer_name, eed.salary_offered, eed.salary_details,
       eed.start_date, eed.action_required, eed.action_deadline,
       eed.next_steps, eed.response_deadline
FROM emails e
JOIN email_classifications ec ON ec.email_id = e.id
JOIN email_extracted_data eed ON eed.email_id = e.id
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND e.urgent_notification_sent = false
    AND ec.is_urgent = true
    AND ec.classification IN ('interview_invite', 'offer', 'follow_up_request')
    AND e.status IN ('extracted', 'labeled', 'draft_created', 'completed')
ORDER BY e.date ASC
LIMIT 5;

BEGIN;

UPDATE emails SET
    urgent_notification_sent = true,
    urgent_notification_sent_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Notifications').item.json.email_id }}'::uuid;

INSERT INTO email_notifications (tenant_id, email_id, notification_type, channel, recipient,
    subject, body, status,
    resend_message_id, sent_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $('Build Notifications').item.json.email_id }}'::uuid,
    '{{ $('Build Notifications').item.json.notification_type }}',
    'email',
    '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.notification_email }}',
    '{{ $('Build Notifications').item.json.notification_subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'HTML notification sent',
    'sent',
    '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || "unknown" }}',
    NOW()
);

COMMIT;
SELECT id AS tenant_id, name AS tenant_name, notification_email, candidate_profile, search_config, email_config FROM tenants WHERE is_active = true
SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'email_notifications_enabled';

SELECT e.id AS email_id, e.subject, e.from_email, e.from_name, e.date,
       e.gmail_message_id,
       ec.classification, ec.sub_category, ec.is_urgent,
       eed.company_name, eed.role_title, eed.contact_person, eed.contact_email,
       eed.interview_date, eed.interview_time, eed.interview_format,
       eed.interview_platform, eed.interview_location, eed.interview_link,
       eed.interviewer_name, eed.salary_offered, eed.salary_details,
       eed.start_date, eed.action_required, eed.action_deadline,
       eed.next_steps, eed.response_deadline
FROM emails e
JOIN email_classifications ec ON ec.email_id = e.id
JOIN email_extracted_data eed ON eed.email_id = e.id
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND e.urgent_notification_sent = false
    AND ec.is_urgent = true
    AND ec.classification IN ('interview_invite', 'offer', 'follow_up_request')
    AND e.status IN ('extracted', 'labeled', 'draft_created', 'completed')
ORDER BY e.date ASC
LIMIT 5;

BEGIN;

UPDATE emails SET
    urgent_notification_sent = true,
    urgent_notification_sent_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Notifications').item.json.email_id }}'::uuid;

INSERT INTO email_notifications (tenant_id, email_id, notification_type, channel, recipient,
    subject, body, status,
    resend_message_id, sent_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $('Build Notifications').item.json.email_id }}'::uuid,
    '{{ $('Build Notifications').item.json.notification_type }}',
    'email',
    '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.notification_email }}',
    '{{ $('Build Notifications').item.json.notification_subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'HTML notification sent',
    'sent',
    '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || "unknown" }}',
    NOW()
);

COMMIT;
